docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
MINUTES FOR JAN-24-2008 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-24-2008 - CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO AGREEMENT BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL FOR THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 3128 - 16TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. SEE MINUTES FOR TERMS OF AGREEMENT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE STIPULATION. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION UNTIL FEB-01-2009. IF NO MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL IS ENTERED, THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: VICKI MACK, REPORTER: BOB BALIAN CSR 5220, DEPT. 514
